pageHero.title: Shwe Myanmar Blog

posts.author: Shwe Myanmar
posts.title: Introducing Our 10 Viss Bulk Pack
posts.excerpt: Our flagship 10 Viss (≈ 16.33 kg) butter pack is now available for wholesale and commercial customers across Myanmar.
content: We are proud to announce the launch of our flagship 10 Viss bulk butter pack — designed specifically for restaurants, food manufacturers, and wholesale distributors across Myanmar.

At approximately 16.33 kg (36 lbs), the 10 Viss pack offers exceptional value for commercial kitchens that use butter daily. Each pack maintains the same natural scent and natural taste (သဘာဝ အနံ့ သဘာဝ အရသာ) that households have trusted for years.
Wholesale pricing is available for qualified customers. Contact our Mandalay office at 095-2-55122 or visit our Wholesale page to submit an inquiry.

posts.author: Shwe Myanmar
posts.title: How We Maintain Natural Taste
posts.excerpt: Learn about our quality control process that ensures every pack delivers natural scent and natural taste.
content: Quality is the foundation of everything we do at Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry. From raw ingredient selection to final packaging, every step is monitored to ensure consistent results.
Our Mandalay production facility follows strict hygiene and quality standards. Each batch is tested for flavor, texture, and freshness before it reaches your kitchen.
This commitment to natural ingredients and careful processing is what gives Shwe Myanmar products their distinctive authentic taste that customers across Myanmar recognize and trust.

posts.author: Shwe Myanmar
posts.title: Mandalay Production Facility Update
posts.excerpt: Shwe Myanmar continues to invest in our Mandalay facility to meet growing demand for premium butter and ghee.
content: Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry is investing in capacity improvements at our Mandalay production facility to better serve the growing demand for premium butter and ghee across Myanmar.
These upgrades include enhanced quality control equipment and expanded packaging lines to support both retail and bulk product lines.
We remain committed to our Mandalay roots while expanding our reach to kitchens and businesses nationwide. Thank you for choosing Shwe Myanmar.

posts.author: Shwe Myanmar
posts.title: 5 Ways to Use Shwe Myanmar Ghee
posts.excerpt: From traditional curries to modern baking — discover versatile uses for our premium ghee.
content: Shwe Myanmar ghee is a versatile ingredient that enhances both traditional Myanmar dishes and modern recipes.
Use it for tempering spices in curries, sautéing vegetables, making paratha and naan, enriching rice dishes, or as a natural substitute for oil in baking.
The high smoke point and rich flavor of our ghee make it ideal for high-heat cooking while adding the authentic taste your family loves.

posts.author: Shwe Myanmar
posts.title: Serving Families Across Myanmar
posts.excerpt: How Shwe Myanmar products reach kitchens from Mandalay to Yangon and beyond.
content: From our home in Mandalay, Shwe Myanmar products travel to kitchens across Myanmar — through our distribution network and trusted retail partners.
Whether you are cooking for your family in Yangon or running a restaurant in Shan State, Shwe Myanmar delivers the same consistent quality in every pack.
We are grateful to the communities that have made Shwe Myanmar a household name. Your trust drives us to keep improving every day.

posts.author: Shwe Myanmar
posts.title: Choosing the Right Pack Size
posts.excerpt: A guide to Shwe Myanmar pack sizes — from 1 Viss retail to 10 Viss bulk.
content: Shwe Myanmar offers butter and ghee in multiple pack sizes to suit different needs. For home kitchens, our 1 Viss and smaller retail packs are convenient and fresh.
For larger families or small eateries, 3 Viss and 5 Viss packs offer better value. Commercial kitchens and wholesalers should consider our 10 Viss bulk pack.
Not sure which size is right for you? Call our hotline at 095-2-55122 and our team will help you choose the best option.
